title: Sankhla Kulfi
description: A creamy traditional kulfi made by reducing milk into rabri with cardamom, saffron, and nuts.
steps: Boil the milk in a heavy-bottomed pan.
Stir continuously over medium heat until reduced to about half its original weight.
Add cardamom powder five minutes before turning off the heat.
Cool slightly, add saffron, then refrigerate for six hours.
Mix in the chopped nuts, pour into moulds, and freeze until set.
notes: Imported from the original Singh's Connoisseur Corner recipe collection.
